case_title: BANK ONE vs. ROSALES, RAYMOND M et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK ONE AS TO DEFENDANT ROSALES, RAYMOND M DOES 1 THROUGH 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-16-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-17-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-27-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-16-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-16-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR SEP-15-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK ONE
OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-15-1994, CONTINUED TO NOV-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-01-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-01-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-01-1994 CONTINUED FROM NOV-01-1994 TO DEC-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BANK ONE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-01-1994, OFF CALENDAR
